conditional: Manchester United may need to make a decision if a rival club meets West Ham's valuation.
headline: Man Utd pursue Mateus Fernandes, West Ham demand £80m
body: Manchester United are pursuing West Ham's Mateus Fernandes, with personal terms not anticipated to be an issue, but the £80m valuation is a sticking point.
text:
Manchester United continue to pursue a move for West Ham United’s Mateus Fernandes.

Personal terms between United and Fernandes are not expected to be an issue. Yet even if Old Trafford is a player’s preference, competition for their signature can have the obvious consequence of driving up and fixing their price.

West Ham’s demands of £80m are expected to be the fundamental sticking point.

United have shown a reluctance to meet that valuation, but if a rival is prepared to move closer to West Ham’s price, the Old Trafford hierarchy could be left with a decision to make.

United are yet to submit a formal bid for Fernandes, although one is expected.

@lauriewhitwell & @mjcritchley
